prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L TFSI EA113 (engine code: **CDL**) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GT3076R turbo** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 22 psi on E85, paired with a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **ID1000 injectors** for 350+ hp at the wheels. Custom **02A 6-speed transmission** with a **Peloquin LSD** and **South Bend Stage 3 clutch** for durability.

Full **Techtonics Tuning** Type 3-specific tubular front and rear subframes with **polyurethane bushings** and **Bilstein B16 coilovers** (adjusted for -2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear) with **H&R 22mm front / 20mm rear sway bars** for neutral handling. **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (330mm rotors) up front with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **ATE Type 200 rear calipers** for balanced braking.

Custom **Schmidt Motorsport** 4-1 equal-length stainless steel header with a **Supersprint 70mm dual-exit exhaust** (resonated center section, straight-pipe rear) and a **VW Motorsport** air-to-water intercooler (front-mount, 500x200x76mm core) with a **Meyle HD aluminum radiator** and **SPAL 16" puller fan** for consistent IATs under boost.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Type 3 Fastback** widebody kit (FRP construction) with **custom 3M Matte Olive Green wrap** (OEM+ texture) and **OEM VW Type 3 notchback rear quarter panels** grafted for a seamless blend. **Hella Turbo headlights** (H4 conversion, Cibie projectors) with **Morimoto HID retrofit** and **Genuine VW Euro-spec taillights** (clear lenses, smoked reflectors).

**Recaro SRD** (E30 shell) front seats with **Schroth 4-point harnesses** and a **Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel** (perforated leather, 3-spoke) on a **NRG quick-release hub**. **Custom Type 3-specific roll cage** (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with **Sparco Pro 2000** rear seats (fold-flat, harness bar compatible).

**BBS RS 15x8" ET20 wheels** (80s VW Motorsport offset) with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires** (205/50/15) and **custom center caps** (VW Motorsport logo, anodized gold). **OEM VW Type 3 Cabriolet chrome trim** (door handles, window frames) and **Hella 160 fog lights** (clear lenses, yellow bulbs) mounted in the front valence.
